{
  "isSuspicious": true,
  "deviation": "The process netsh.exe, spawned by powershell.exe, is adding an inbound firewall rule for python.exe located in a user's AppData directory. While netsh.exe is a legitimate tool, this specific command line and execution chain are commonly observed in malicious activity to establish persistence or enable command and control communication.",
  "indicators": [
    "netsh.exe",
    "firewall rule",
    "add rule",
    "python.exe",
    "appdata",
    "powershell.exe"
  ]
}
